get.description: Get Forgejo git credentials for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a unified DocsProject backed by the chosen VCS provider (forgejo, github, or bitbucket)

delete.description: Delete a unified DocsProject. Tears down deploys + publish records + cached builds, repoints user activeProjectUid, deletes the Forgejo repo (if any), and notifies subscribers. User-owned GitHub repos are left untouched.

get.description: Get a unified DocsProject by slug for the current team

post.description: Update editable repository settings (tracked branch, config path) on a unified DocsProject. Publish flags live in scalar.config.json.
Convert a Forgejo-backed DocsProject into a GitHub-backed one. Reads every file from the Forgejo repo and opens a single PR on the chosen GitHub repo putting the content under scalar-docs/.
Convert a GitHub-backed DocsProject back to a Forgejo-backed one. Migrates the GitHub repository contents into a fresh Forgejo repo and flips the project provider.
Convert a Forgejo-backed DocsProject into a Bitbucket-backed one. Reads every file from the Forgejo repo and opens a single PR on the chosen Bitbucket repo putting the content under scalar-docs/.
Convert a Bitbucket-backed DocsProject back to a Forgejo-backed one. Migrates the Bitbucket repository contents into a fresh Forgejo repo and flips the project provider.
Re-register the Bitbucket webhook on a Bitbucket-backed DocsProject. Used to recover from a failed initial registration after the linker user is granted repo admin.
